title: My better Minecraft
description: Fabric modpack for Minecraft that enhance the overall vanilla minecraft experience
body:
This is a modpack with mods, datapacks and resourcepacks that enhance the overall minecraft vanilla experience and change some small things like giving a use to rotten flesh or being able to crawl


<details>
<summary>Included mods</summary>

<details>
<summary>Mod dependencies (included in the modpack)</summary>

- [Anvian's Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/anvians-lib) ([MoreBeeInfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/morebeeinfo))
- [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) ([Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions))
- [CICADA](https://modrinth.com/mod/cicada) ([Do a Barrel Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/do-a-barrel-roll))
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) (configuration mod)
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective) ([Better Spawner Control](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-spawner-control))
- [Enchantment Text Styling](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-text-styling) ([Enchantment Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-tooltips))
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (basically for almost every mod)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) (for mod compatibility)
- [Forge Config API Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) ([Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic))
- [Iceberg](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceberg) ([Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips))
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) ([Sodium 0.5.11](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium))
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) ([Just Enough Breeding (JEBr)](https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbreeding), [Just Enough Professions (JEP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-professions-jep) and [Just Enough Resources (JER)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-resources-jer))
- [MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) ([Litematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica))
- [Prickle](https://modrinth.com/mod/prickle) ([Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions))
- [Prism](https://modrinth.com/mod/prism-lib) ([Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips))
- [Puzzles Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib) ([Easy Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-magic))
- [Silk](https://modrinth.com/mod/silk) ([Veinminer](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer) ([Veinminer Enchantment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/veinminer-enchantment)))
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) ([Elytra Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot))
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) ([Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/mod/fullbright))

</details>


<details>
<summary>Resource packs</summary>

- [Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emissive-ores)
- [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
- [In-Game Brewing Guide](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/in-game-brewing-guide)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Resource pack dependencies (included in the modpack)</summary>

- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) ([Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations))
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) ([Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations))
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) ([Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/emissive-ores))

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>

The versioning format is <MC version>-x.y(.z), where 
- the MC version taken is the minor release the version of this modpack is for,
- x is a mod list revision (addition/removal of a mod)
- y is the config revision (incremented every time a config tweak is added or changed)
- z is incremented when there's a version with only mod updates and little to no changes otherwise.

x.y.z is reset to 1.0.0 for every new MC release as different MC versions are very likely to have different mod sets available for them.

This modpack uses the versioning of [SO (Simply Optimized)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) by [HyperSoop](https://modrinth.com/user/HyperSoop)

</details>
